title: How Simulations Drive Real Organizational Change
subtitle: 先模拟再行动：为什么变革总是失败

paragraphs.en: Simulators are most often utilized within industries such as nuclear power, aviation and surgery where failure results in disastrous consequences. To maximize the value from a simulation learning experience, participants should immediately and directly apply their learning to a specific intervention within their organization. Most organizations aspire to deploy significant change programs, only to find them nearly impossible to implement.
paragraphs.zh: 模拟器最常用于核电、航空和外科等一旦失败便会造成灾难性后果的行业。要最大化模拟学习体验的价值，参与者应立即直接将所学应用于组织内的具体干预措施。大多数组织渴望部署重大变革计划，却发现几乎无法实施。

paragraphs.en: That is largely because successful change requires more than a vision, it requires a workforce that not only doesn't resist change, but embraces it. To achieve success, an organization must build a transformation program that will allow change to be rapidly pulled across its departments and throughout its layers. Regardless of the level of senior management commitment, unless key thought leaders at all levels embrace the change, the initiative will wither and die.
paragraphs.zh: 这主要是因为成功的变革需要的不仅是愿景，还需要一支不仅不抵制变革而且拥抱变革的员工队伍。为取得成功，组织必须制定转型计划，使变革能迅速贯穿各部门和各层级。无论高层管理者承诺程度多高，除非各级关键意见领袖都接受变革，否则倡议必将枯萎消亡。

paragraphs.en: To create this kind of widespread passion, learning leaders must expose the workforce to what could be, which will enable them to rethink their mental models, break free from their deep-rooted paradigms and embrace the opportunity to learn. Allowing participants to enter a simulated environment provides them with the opportunity to experience alternative realities which can prompt them to rethink their current beliefs.
paragraphs.zh: 为激发这种广泛热情，学习领导者必须让员工接触可能性的图景，使他们能重新思考心智模式，摆脱根深蒂固的范式并拥抱学习机会。让参与者进入模拟环境，为他们提供了体验替代现实的机会，能促使他们反思当前信念。

paragraphs.en: Behavioral change is not easy for most adults. Lectures, training programs and workshops can explain the intellectual elements of transformation, but they are seldom effective at getting to the behavioral aspects that lie at the heart of a significant change initiative. Further, under normal working conditions, managers rarely see the full effect of their employee development efforts. As such, an intervention like a simulation can provide the stimulus for change.
paragraphs.zh: 对大多数成年人而言，行为改变并非易事。讲座、培训项目和工作坊可以解释变革的理性要素，却很少能触及重大变革举措核心的行为层面。此外，在正常工作条件下，管理者很少能看到员工发展努力的全部效果。因此，模拟这类干预手段能为变革提供刺激。

paragraphs.en: An effective simulation can be better than experience as a learning tool because it accelerates time, compresses space, and unlike reality, is specifically designed to maximize participant learning. Simulations provide an immersive learning experience where skills, processes and knowledge all can be highlighted in a way reality cannot. The ability to explore, experiment and repeatedly apply new knowledge in unlimited, risk-free models is what makes simulation one of the most productive forms of learning.
paragraphs.zh: 有效的模拟作为学习工具可能优于真实体验，因为它加速时间、压缩空间，且与现实不同，专门为最大化参与者学习而设计。模拟提供沉浸式学习体验，技能、流程和知识都能以现实无法实现的方式被凸显。在无限、无风险的模型中进行探索、实验和反复应用新知的能力，使模拟成为最高效的学习形式之一。

paragraphs.en: Well-designed simulations can enable individuals and groups to develop a deep level of understanding about how their decisions and intuitive responses to business stimuli affect their fellow participants and the organization as a whole. To reap the benefits, however, simulations must feel like reality. At the end of the successful simulation, participants must declare 'this is us.' If they don't, they will view the experience as a game, which can be difficult to apply on the job.
paragraphs.zh: 精心设计的模拟能让个人和团队深刻理解其决策和对业务刺激的直觉反应如何影响其他参与者及整个组织。然而，要收获这些益处，模拟必须感觉真实。成功模拟结束时，参与者必须认定“这就是我们”。否则，他们会将体验视为游戏，难以应用于实际工作。

paragraphs.en: To maximize benefits from simulation, participants should immediately apply the learning from the experience to forge a smooth link between learning and doing.
paragraphs.zh: 为最大化模拟效益，参与者应立即应用从体验中学到的知识，在学习与行动之间建立顺畅联系。
